technique_summary: Excellent expert-level performance with smooth cutting technique and proper instrument coordination. Completion time of 56 seconds falls well within expert range.
strengths: Excellent time efficiency (56s vs 60-90s expert benchmark)
Good instrument coordination between grasper and scissors
improvement_suggestions: Focus on maintaining exact distance from marked line throughout cut
Consider slight adjustment in cutting angle at 3 o'clock position
